plugin.name: GitHub Sync
settings.section.label: GitHub Sync
settings.page.label: Settings
settings.page.title: GitHub Sync
settings.page.subtitle: Import your public GitHub repositories into Strapi project entries.
settings.overview.title: What this plugin does
settings.overview.body: This plugin reads repositories from the configured GitHub account and creates or updates entries in your project collection. Existing featured flags remain untouched, so manual curation inside Strapi is preserved.
settings.requirements.title: Required environment variables
settings.actions.title: Actions
settings.actions.body: Run a manual sync at any time to fetch the latest repositories and push them into your project content type.
settings.actions.result: Last run: {created} created, {updated} updated, {total} total processed.
settings.sync.error: GitHub sync failed. Check your plugin server logs and GitHub credentials.
